examples.title: Subset Construction Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of the subset construction algorithm.
examples.code:
FUNCTION subsetConstruction(NFA)
  CREATE DFA
  FOR EACH state IN NFA
    CREATE NEW STATE IN DFA
  FOR EACH transition IN NFA
    CREATE NEW TRANSITION IN DFA
  FOR EACH acceptingState IN NFA
    CREATE NEW ACCEPTING STATE IN DFA
  RETURN DFA
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode implementation of the subset construction algorithm creates a new DFA from a given NFA.
